name: RPlog_The_Prisoner
title: Interrogating the Corellian
summary: Aboard the Imperial Star Destroyer Inquisitor in orbit over Corellia, the intelligence officer Lieutenant Rainier gathers executive officer Valerius and the hapless pilot Jonas on the observation deck to brief them on a captured CorSec resistance leader named Durjan. Rainier reports that the cell-structured insurgency has likely circulated the trio's identities, complicating their work, and that Durjan has so far resisted all interrogation methods. Amid friction over the newly arrived COMPNOR/ISB recruit Tel, the three descend to the ship's antiseptic prison wing to confront Durjan personally. Battered and defiant, the Corellian spits accusations that they serve a monstrous Empire and have no true loyalty, taunting Jonas in particular. Valerius coolly handles the interrogator's tools and rebuts that they are there not over personal grudges but because Durjan has killed people, as the prisoner remains unbroken.
